challenge.title: Korak 24
challenge.description:
Drugi uslov u kojem morate premestiti disk sa source na target je onaj gde izvorna lista nije prazna i poslednji disk u source je niži od poslednjeg diska u target.

Dodajte izraz elif da proverite ovo stanje. Zatim, postavite vrednost forward na True ako je uslov ispunjen.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Trebalo bi da koristiš izraz elif da proveriš da li rods[source] nije prazan i rods[source][-1] < rods[target][-1].
Treba da staviš forward unutar svog novog izraza elif, a to na mestu True. Nije dozvoljeno menjati prethodno raspoređenu vrednost od forward.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
NUMBER_OF_DISKS = 5
A = list(range(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, 0, -1))
B = []
C = []

def move(n, source, auxiliary, target):
    if n <= 0:
        return
    # move n - 1 disks from source to auxiliary, so they are out of the way
    move(n - 1, source, target, auxiliary)
        
    # move the nth disk from source to target
    target.append(source.pop())
        
    # display our progress
    print(A, B, C, '\n')
        
    # move the n - 1 disks that we left on auxiliary onto target
    move(n - 1,  auxiliary, source, target)
              
# initiate call from source A to target C with auxiliary B
move(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, A, B, C)
